items.title: Innate (YC F24) – Home robots as easy to program as AI agents
items.summary: Innate launches a platform making home robots programmable with the ease of AI agents, potentially revolutionizing domestic robotics.

items.title: symphony: OpenAI's orchestrator of autonomous dev agents
items.summary: OpenAI has open-sourced 'symphony', an orchestration framework designed to manage and coordinate multiple autonomous development agents.

items.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
items.summary: Anthropic's new Cowork desktop agent for Claude allows users to interact with and perform tasks on their local files without requiring any coding.

items.title: Sourcetable – AI Spreadsheet and Data Platform
items.summary: Sourcetable introduces an AI-powered spreadsheet and data platform that enables users to manage and analyze data using natural language.

items.title: Dedalus Labs (YC S25) – Vercel for Agents
items.summary: Dedalus Labs is building a platform akin to Vercel, providing infrastructure for deploying and managing AI agents at scale.

items.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
items.summary: Railway has raised $100 million in funding to develop AI-native cloud infrastructure, positioning itself as a competitor to established cloud providers like AWS.

items.title: Dropbase AI – A Prompt-Based Python Web App Builder
items.summary: Dropbase AI is an open-source tool that allows users to build Python web applications by simply providing natural language prompts.

items.title: Vellum (YC W23) – Dev Platform for LLM Apps
items.summary: Vellum offers a comprehensive development platform designed to help engineers build, evaluate, and deploy large language model applications.

items.title: Spatial-TTT: Streaming Visual-based Spatial Intelligence with Test-Time Training
items.summary: This research presents a novel approach for real-time visual-based spatial intelligence that continuously adapts models during inference.

items.title: IndexCache: Accelerating Sparse Attention via Cross-Layer Index Reuse
items.summary: A new research paper introduces IndexCache, a method to significantly accelerate sparse attention mechanisms in LLMs by reusing indices across layers.

items.title: Video-Based Reward Modeling for Computer-Use Agents
items.summary: This study explores the use of video data to construct effective reward models for AI agents that interact with computer interfaces, improving task learning.

items.title: ShotVerse: Advancing Cinematic Camera Control for Text-Driven Multi-Shot Video Creation
items.summary: ShotVerse proposes a framework that enables text-driven generation of multi-shot videos with sophisticated cinematic camera control.

items.title: DreamVideo-Omni: Omni-Motion Controlled Multi-Subject Video Customization with Latent Identity Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: This research introduces DreamVideo-Omni, a method for generating customized multi-subject videos with precise omni-motion control and consistent identity.

items.title: Inkeep (YC W23) – Copilot for Support (think Cursor for help desks)
items.summary: Inkeep introduces an AI-powered copilot specifically tailored to enhance productivity and efficiency for support and help desk teams.

items.title: Strategic Navigation or Stochastic Search? How Agents and Humans Reason Over Document Collections
items.summary: Researchers investigate the distinct strategies AI agents and humans employ when navigating and extracting information from large document collections.
